mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, phone, email, avatar, status, login_fail_count, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, phone, email, avatar, status, login_fail_count, del_flag, create_by, remark) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{loginFailCount}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET del_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = 0, status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
